scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/ishu run dev"
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:free-ports && pnpm run dev:all
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.sync:isolation: pnpm run sync:modules && pnpm run sync:pages
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
